items.title: Morgan Stanley Launches Bitcoin, Ethereum, and Solana Trading on E*Trade
items.whyYouShouldCare: Morgan Stanley's addition of Solana trading on E*Trade enhances accessibility and could drive increased liquidity and user engagement within the Solana ecosystem.

items.title: Morgan Stanley’s E*TRADE launches spot crypto trading through Zero Hash
items.whyYouShouldCare: The launch of spot crypto trading through Zero Hash by E*TRADE signifies growing infrastructure support for Solana, potentially boosting its adoption and market presence.

items.title: Airbnb CEO says X account was hacked, attacker posted AI-slop on tokenization
items.whyYouShouldCare: The hacking incident involving Airbnb's CEO highlights the ongoing risks in the crypto space, which could impact user confidence and participation in platforms utilizing Solana.
